components.name: sodium acetate
components.evidence: the cells were centrifuged, washed with prewarmed postshift medium, and shifted to minimal medium containing 60 mM Acetate

components.name: ammonium chloride (NH4Cl)
components.evidence: is supplemented with 20 mM NH4Cl and the specified carbon sources

components.name: dipotassium phosphate trihydrate (K2HPO4.3H2O)
components.evidence: we used N+C+ minimal medium, which contains K2SO4 (1 g), K2HPO4.3H2O (17.7 g), KH2PO4 (4.7 g), MgSO4.7H2O (0.1 g), and NaCl (2.5 g) in one liter

components.name: monopotassium phosphate (KH2PO4)
components.evidence: K2HPO4.3H2O (17.7 g), KH2PO4 (4.7 g), MgSO4.7H2O (0.1 g), and NaCl (2.5 g) in one liter

components.name: potassium sulfate (K2SO4)
components.evidence: N+C+ minimal medium, which contains K2SO4 (1 g), K2HPO4.3H2O (17.7 g)

components.name: magnesium sulfate heptahydrate (MgSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: MgSO4.7H2O (0.1 g), and NaCl (2.5 g) in one liter

components.name: sodium chloride (NaCl)
components.evidence: MgSO4.7H2O (0.1 g), and NaCl (2.5 g) in one liter

components.name: calcium chloride (CaCl2)
components.evidence: One liter of the 1000x mineral solution contained MgCl2 (60 g), CaCl2 (5.5 g), FeSO4.7H2O (5.5 g), ... dissolved in 100 mM HCl

components.name: iron(II) sulfate heptahydrate (FeSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: the 1000x mineral solution contained MgCl2 (60 g), CaCl2 (5.5 g), FeSO4.7H2O (5.5 g), MnCl2 (19.7 mg)

components.name: manganese(II) chloride (MnCl2)
components.evidence: FeSO4.7H2O (5.5 g), MnCl2 (19.7 mg), CoCl2 (23.8 mg)

components.name: cobalt(II) chloride (CoCl2)
components.evidence: MnCl2 (19.7 mg), CoCl2 (23.8 mg), Ni2SO4 (26.2 mg)

components.name: nickel sulfate (NiSO4)
components.evidence: CoCl2 (23.8 mg), Ni2SO4 (26.2 mg), CuCl2 (15.9 mg)

components.name: copper(II) chloride (CuCl2)
components.evidence: Ni2SO4 (26.2 mg), CuCl2 (15.9 mg), (NH4)2MoO4 (23.5 mg)

components.name: ammonium molybdate ((NH4)2MoO4)
components.evidence: CuCl2 (15.9 mg), (NH4)2MoO4 (23.5 mg), SeO2 (11 mg)

components.name: selenium dioxide (SeO2)
components.evidence: (NH4)2MoO4 (23.5 mg), SeO2 (11 mg), ZnSO4 (28.7 mg)

components.name: zinc sulfate (ZnSO4)
components.evidence: SeO2 (11 mg), ZnSO4 (28.7 mg), and H3BO4 (6.2 mg) dissolved in 100 mM HCl

components.name: boric acid (H3BO3)
components.evidence: ZnSO4 (28.7 mg), and H3BO4 (6.2 mg) dissolved in 100 mM HCl

components.name: magnesium chloride (MgCl2)
components.role: magnesium (trace-stock; bulk Mg supplied by MgSO4)
components.evidence: One liter of the 1000x mineral solution contained MgCl2 (60 g), CaCl2 (5.5 g)

components.name: oxygen (O2)
components.evidence: Batch culture aerobic growth was performed in a 37 C water bath shaker or air incubator shaking at 250 rpm

components.name: water
components.evidence: in one liter ... N+C+ minimal medium

components.name: proton (H+)
components.evidence: dissolved in 100 mM HCl (mineral stock); phosphate buffer sets medium pH

media.base_medium: N-C- (N+C+) minimal medium of Csonka, Ikeda, Fletcher & Kustu 1994 (J. Bacteriol. 176:6324-33), as used for E. coli K-12 NCM3722; acetate condition supplemented with 60 mM sodium acetate

sources_chased.what: aerobic N+C+ base recipe cited as ref 38 (Csonka et al. 1994)
sources_chased.how: main-text recipe quoted directly in this paper's Methods (Growth media)

sources_chased.what: complete trace-element / micronutrient mix (paper's own 1000x mineral solution, defined in the anaerobic-base-medium Methods)
sources_chased.how: verbatim from this paper's Methods; independently corroborated as the standard NCM3722 1000x micronutrient stock via web search

media.notes: Bulk salts, N source and 60 mM acetate C source are verbatim from the aerobic N+C+ recipe (cited Csonka 1994). The paper prints the full trace-element mineral solution only in the anaerobic-base-medium Methods (MgCl2, CaCl2, FeSO4, MnCl2, CoCl2, NiSO4, CuCl2, ammonium molybdate, SeO2, ZnSO4, H3BO3 in 100 mM HCl); this is the same standard NCM3722 1000x micronutrient stock the Hwa/Sauer lab uses for its minimal media, so the seven trace metals already in the record are confirmed and four more (Ni, Mo, Se, B) are added. Confidence is medium because the printed aerobic recipe does not itself restate the micronutrient supplement or its dilution, so trace-element final concentrations are left null.
